name: ahtml-monorepo
description: AHTML — the HTML of the agent web.

scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run test:ux && npm run test:docs
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @ahtmljs/schema && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/extract && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/kv && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/agent && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/next && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/vite && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/hono && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/astro && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/sveltekit && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/langchain && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/webmcp && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/conformance && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/cli && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/insights && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/index && npm run build -w @ahtmljs/badge
